title: Wallet SQLite schema: notes, witnesses, tx history
description: Design and implement wallet DB schema. Tables: notes (txid, output_index, value, memo, spent), witnesses (per-note Merkle path updated each block), transactions (txid, height, direction, amount, memo, peer_pub_id). Use sqlx migrations.
close_reason: Migration v2 adds notes/witnesses/transactions tables. CRUD methods + 7 new tests including cascade-delete, witness upsert, v1→v2 migration preservation.
